changes_made: Renamed k8s_audit_log_policy_change_detection to k8s_audit_policy_change_detection_enabled for consistency
review_notes: The functions are applicable as they relate to Kubernetes audit logging capabilities, which can be configured to monitor policy changes. The naming was mostly correct but required a minor adjustment for consistency and clarity.
naming_improvements: Ensure consistent use of 'enabled' to indicate a pass/fail state
title: Requirement 8.1.2
step1_reasoning: The control 8.1.2 focuses on monitoring and logging policy changes, which can be mapped to Kubernetes audit logging capabilities. Kubernetes audit logs can be configured to capture and alert on changes to policies, such as RBAC policies or NetworkPolicies, by setting appropriate audit policies.
